response:
La plage la plus proche se trouve à une distance de conduite facile, située à environ 6...  


This translation maintains the original tone (informative and neutral) and meaning, using natural French phrasing. "Se trouve" and "située" both convey the sense of "lying" in this context, and "à une distance de conduite facile" accurately translates "within easy driving distance." The structure flows smoothly, preserving the connection between the two clauses.
